lighting.shadow_character: 흰색 반사판이나 보조광으로 채워진 부드러운 그림자

color.grading_style: 블랙 레벨 리프팅 (Lifting Blacks)을 통한 매트한 필름 룩

composition.composition_rule: 삼분할 법칙 (Rule of Thirds) 및 리딩 라인 (Leading Line)

texture.detail_rendering: 음식, 식기, 소품의 질감이 섬세하게 표현됨

improvement_notes: 드라마틱한 연출을 위해 그리드를 사용한 조명, 색상 대비 강조, 클로즈업이나 스토리텔링 요소를 가미한 구도 변경 등을 시도할 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: A professional food photograph of [Your Dish Here], minimalist composition. Shot at a 45-degree angle, medium shot. Lit with a large, diffused soft light from the back-left, creating soft and gentle shadows to the front-right. The overall mood is warm, calm, and clean. The color palette is dominated by warm neutrals like beige, cream, and brown, with subtle color accents. Desaturated colors, lifted blacks for a matte, filmic look. Photographed with an 85mm lens at f/4 for a shallow depth of field. The image has a fine, subtle film grain. The aesthetic is similar to Kodak Portra 400 film, reminiscent of Kinfolk magazine style.
